parameters.text: =Thanks for your message — we'll get back to you shortly. (Auto-reply)

parameters.content:
## WhatsApp Auto-Reply

**Flow:** an inbound WhatsApp message fires the **SocialMate Trigger** → **Send Auto-Reply** sends a canned acknowledgement back to the same chat.

**Setup:**
1. Create one **SocialMate API** credential (Server URL `http://127.0.0.1:3456` if n8n is on the same machine, or your named-tunnel hostname). An **admin**-scope key lets the Trigger register its own webhook.
2. Edit the reply text in **Send Auto-Reply**.
3. **Save & Activate**, then message the connected number to test.

Text send works on **Free**. The reply still passes through the anti-ban engine.
